title: Omni-Loom
subtitle: A Deterministic Generative Compiler for Cyber-Physical Creativity
thesis: Omni-Loom transforms open-ended creative intent into reproducible, auditable fabrication pipelines—bridging generative algorithms and physical artifacts through a deterministic compiler model.

problem.heading: The Gap in AI Creativity
body: Generative AI excels at producing infinite variations, but creative professionals lack deterministic pipelines that guarantee reproducibility, traceability, and physical manufacturability.
The path from intent → geometry → artifact is fragmented across incompatible tools, manual handoffs, and opaque model outputs.
highlights: No deterministic pipeline from intent to artifact
Loss of auditability in generative workflows
Cyber-physical gap: digital designs fail fabrication constraints

architecture.heading: System Architecture
body: Omni-Loom is structured as a compiler: high-level creative intent is parsed, type-checked against fabrication constraints, and lowered into executable tool plans.

diagram.label: Job Compiler
diagram.description: Intent → typed job with validation and constraint solving

diagram.label: Tool Plan
diagram.description: Deterministic sequence of operations and parameters

diagram.label: Geometry Kernel
diagram.description: Procedural geometry generation with fabrication-aware primitives

diagram.label: Artifact Output
diagram.description: G-code, SVG, mesh, or raster ready for fabrication

pipeline.name: Intent Capture
pipeline.description: Structured input capturing creative direction, constraints, and material parameters.
pipeline.input: Natural language + reference images + material spec

pipeline.name: Job Compilation
pipeline.description: Validation, constraint propagation, and feasibility checks against fabrication domain.

pipeline.name: Tool Plan Generation
pipeline.description: Deterministic lowering of job manifest into tool-specific operations.

pipeline.name: Geometry Synthesis
pipeline.description: Procedural geometry generation using fabrication-aware primitives and tolerances.

pipeline.name: Artifact Emission
pipeline.description: Output formatting for target machines: laser, CNC, 3D print, or textile.

demo.title: Live Compiler Demo
demo.description: Input a creative intent and watch Omni-Loom compile a verified tool plan and preview geometry in real time.

roadmap.objective: Validate compiler pipeline for laser-cut and CNC domains
Expand to textile and additive manufacturing
Open-source core geometry kernel and design-system UI
